name: finance-organizer
description: Onboarding-driven personal + small-business finance organizer. An interview captures the user's structure, sets of books, account map, personal/business overlap, locality/tax, and branding into a per-user config; then Finance Inbox filing and a configurable ledger (Beancount or simple spreadsheet) run off it. Optional modules: related-party, claims, payment plans, bill reminders (due dates to calendar), and brand outputs.
